text: The first space feels empty, almost clinical, with the quiet tension of an uninhabited corridor—like a breath held in expectation. Crossing into the exhibit, immersed in the R+D display, I feel a surge of curiosity and reflection. Surrounded by ideas on consciousness and coexistence with machines, I sense both excitement at human creativity and a gentle uneasiness at our entwinement with technology. The colors and lights ignite thought; I am alert, engaged, and slightly overwhelmed by possibility.
